## Checklist

- [ ] `mvn clean package` builds successfully.
- [ ] I tested the change on a Paper/Spigot server with EssentialsX installed.
- [ ] New/changed endpoints check the appropriate `Permission` and write to the audit log.
- [ ] I did not commit any secrets, tokens, or personal data.
- [ ] I updated the relevant `wiki-build/` page(s) if behaviour or config changed.
